'''Tosh''' was the herd-mother of a [[Rancor/Legends|rancor]] tribe that belonged to the [[Singing Mountain Clan]] on [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]]. According to a [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]] report, Tosh was the largest and oldest rancor ever cataloged. She was the mother of [[Dhum]] and [[Ichor (rancor)|Ichor]], who was killed in battle against the [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsisters]].

Tosh was very capable on the battlefield, aiding the Singing Mountain Clan using varied primitive weapons. In one instance, after seeing an [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|Imperial walker]] murder her daughter Ichor, she went on a rampage, completely smashing several walkers and then stomping on a Nightsister who threatened [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]. She was capable of scaling steep cliffs and crossing large crevasses effectively while carrying both passengers and heavy cargo.
